hero.title: Building Sustainable Rural Development in White Nile State
hero.subtitle: A community-based initiative improving rural livelihoods through gum arabic, agriculture, livestock, training, and women and youth empowerment.

home.introText: We are a local community initiative in White Nile State, Sudan, working to improve rural livelihoods through integrated programs covering gum arabic, agriculture, livestock, training, and women and youth empowerment.
home.impact3: Protect and increase gum arabic trees
home.impact4: Include women and youth in programs

areas.gumArabicDesc: Supporting gum arabic production, marketing, and tree conservation
areas.treeCareDesc: Planting new trees and caring for existing forests
areas.agricultureDesc: Supporting tomato, vegetable, and fodder crop farming
areas.livestockDesc: Improving cattle, sheep, and goat husbandry
areas.trainingDesc: Specialized training programs and certifications for producers
areas.womenYouthDesc: Programs for women and youth participation in development
areas.ruralDevDesc: Improving infrastructure and services in rural areas
areas.dataDesc: Data collection and social impact measurement

about.title: About Us
about.whoWeAreText: White Nile Village Development is a local community initiative founded to improve the lives of rural families in White Nile State, Sudan. We work through a participatory approach that places the local community at the heart of the development process.
about.missionText: To improve the livelihoods of rural families through integrated and sustainable programs in gum arabic, agriculture, livestock, training, and women and youth empowerment.
about.visionText: Thriving and sustainable rural communities in White Nile State, where every producer and family has the resources and knowledge needed for sustainable development.
about.committeeText: The initiative is managed by a locally elected committee comprising representatives of producers, women, youth, and village leaders.
about.legalStatusText: The registration of the organization as a local NGO and the relevant official permit processes will be carried out in accordance with the procedures of the Humanitarian Aid Commission (HAC) and the competent authorities in Sudan.

programs.title: Programs
programs.subtitle: Our integrated programs for rural development
programs.p1Desc: Supporting producers in improving the quality and quantity of gum arabic production through training and modern techniques.
programs.p1Target: Gum arabic producers in White Nile State
programs.p1Impact: Increase gum arabic production quality and improve producer income
programs.p2Desc: Protecting existing trees and planting new ones to combat desertification and increase production.
programs.p2Impact: Increase tree count and improve vegetation cover
programs.p3Desc: Supporting tomato, vegetable, and fodder crop farming through training and seed provision.
programs.p3Impact: Improve food security and increase agricultural income
programs.p4Desc: Improving livestock husbandry through veterinary care, nutrition, and training.
programs.p5Desc: Engaging women and youth in development programs and providing training and employment opportunities.
programs.p5Target: Women and youth in rural areas
programs.p5Impact: Increase women and youth participation in local economy
programs.p6Desc: Providing specialized training programs and issuing certified certificates to participants.
programs.p7Desc: Collecting and analyzing data to measure social impact and guide programs.
programs.p7Impact: Improve program targeting and impact measurement

registration.title: Producer & Family Registration
registration.subtitle: Register household, gum arabic, agriculture, livestock and training information for the rural development program.
registration.trustLine: Personal data is protected and never shared publicly.
registration.privacyDesc1: Data is collected only for development planning and resource mapping.
registration.privacyDesc2: Personal information is protected and used only for development planning, needs assessment, training coordination and future support opportunities.
registration.privacyDesc3: Public reports utilize anonymous, aggregated statistics only.
registration.privacyDesc4: Registration does not create an automatic financial support promise.
registration.privacyDesc5: The assessment supports eligibility review for future training and agricultural opportunities.
registration.consent1: I agree to my data being used for project evaluation purposes.
registration.consent2: I understand that my personal information will not be published publicly.
registration.consent3: I agree that the NGO may use this data anonymously for grant applications and statistical reports.
registration.successMessage: Thank you for registering. Your application number is:
